events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the back-pitched condensing PVC flue is a **fail**, **high risk** — it lets condensate pool/freeze in the vent, risking flue blockage and CO spillage into the structure, and violates manufacturer venting instructions under IRC M1801/NFPA 54. Immediate action is to stop work, reinstall the vent section with correct slope toward the drain, verify the condensate trap/drain, and perform a draft/leak test before returning the furnace to service.
